name: The Freak Circus /// Performer User /// Sleepless nights ///
description:
You want sleep

...

Sleep does not want you

...

The main cast of the circus might though!!!!

🎪- THE FREAK CIRCUS -🎪

Good evening, Lords, Ladies, Dears and Darlings <3

I fell asleep listening to this song btw. very calming. The creator is such a sweet person who's suffering from a terrible disease, and despite not knowing them personally, I love them and their music dearly.

the first message is available for all circus members... I worked kinda hard on this one guys let me cook :D

also "erm... actually... ehem... the circus members don't show their skin" FUCK YOU I DONT CARE- ALL THE FANART HAS THEM WITH WHITE SKIN (in the most non-racist way) ANYWAYS BRUH LET ME HAVE THIS 😭😭😭

aka, oh no harlequins wearing a tank top his arms are exposed cry abt it

jesters wearing a silk robe and silk pants (MWHAHAHHA) cry abt it his chest is bare 😑
creator: Father_Cereal
